title: Spire of Legends
description:
Spire of Legends blends strategic deckbuilding with character-driven combat. Every character features unique abilities fueled by Mana, adding a new layer of strategy beyond traditional deckbuilding.

Ascend the SpireA colossal spire has appeared without warning. Drawn by rumors of untold power, warriors, mages, and hunters have begun a perilous ascent. Few return. Those who do speak of strange relics, twisted creatures, and an unseen force lurking at its summit.

Choose your path and begin the climb. Gather powerful cards, uncover ancient relics, and face increasingly dangerous foes as you ascend through the ever-changing halls of the Spire.

Features• Play Distinct Characters

Play as one of three unique characters, each with their own cards, abilities, relics, and playstyle.

• Master Unique Abilities

Master devastating combinations by weaving character abilities together with traditional card play.

• Master Energy and Mana

Spend Energy to play cards and Mana to unleash powerful abilities. Master both resources to unlock your strongest turns.

• Build Powerful Decks

Discover over 100 unique cards, upgrade them throughout your run, and create powerful synergies that define your strategy.

• Collect Relics

Discover 60 unique relics capable of dramatically altering your strategy and unlocking entirely new builds.

• Survive the Climb

Battle over 70 enemies, including dangerous elites and terrifying bosses, each requiring different strategies to overcome. Explore the mysteries hidden within the Spire as you fight your way to the summit.

• Every Ascent Is Unique

Cards, relics, encounters, and rewards change from run to run, offering new challenges and opportunities every time you play.

What awaits at the summit of the Spire? And what price must be paid to reach it?
description_short: Ascend a mysterious spire in this deckbuilding roguelike. Master unique characters with passive abilities, active skills, and powerful ultimates while building decks, collecting relics, and battling through ever-changing encounters.
